case_title: KAPLAN, PAUL T. VS SMITH, MARTIN B. YELLOW AIRPORT EXPRESS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $428.66 FILED BY KAPLAN, PAUL T. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, MARTIN B.   YELLOW AIRPORT EXPRESS YELLOW AIRPORT EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
